entities.name: SORGHUM

entities.description: The commercial processing of sorghum grain, involving small- and medium-scale mills

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY CROP
entities.description: A crop primarily consumed in rural areas to ensure basic food availability

entities.name: COMMERCIAL CROP
entities.description: A crop produced for sale and profit in urban markets

entities.name: URBAN FOOD MARKET
entities.description: The commercial marketplace in cities where food products are sold
